mirage.subtitle: Describe an edit in plain language — Mirage transforms what you see
mirage.tryPrompt: Describe any edit in plain language — you can chain several in one message. Try one of these:
mirage.placeholder: e.g. "make it warmer and remove the background"
mirage.enterHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

oneGo: Brighten, remove the background, and upscale 2x
Warm it up and add a soft shadow
Black & white with more contrast, then sharpen
enhance: Make it brighter and more vibrant

dock.title: Dune - your co-writer
dock.subtitle: Researches, drafts and polishes with you

articleStudio.emptyBody: Pick an article from the rail or start a new draft. Dune researches, drafts and polishes beside you.
articleStudio.confirmDelete: Delete this article? This can't be undone.

selection.hint: Select text in the editor to rewrite it.
selection.tooLong: Selection is too long (6,000 characters max).
selection.stale: The text changed since this suggestion - reselect and try again.

checks.heuristic: Heuristic estimate, not a detector verdict - use it as a writing signal.
checks.original: No matches found - your text looks original.
checks.stale: That sentence changed since this suggestion - rerun checks and try again.

gate.title: Connect your SEO data provider
gate.body: Plagiarism scanning runs on your own DataForSEO account. Add your credentials in Settings - pay-per-use, a fraction of a cent per check.

checks.runHint: On-page SEO, AI patterns and originality in one pass.

assistant.tagline: Ask Dune for an outline, a stronger intro, supporting stats, or anything else this article needs.
assistant.placeholder: Ask Dune anything about this article...

prompts.outline: Suggest a clear outline for this article, with headings that would strengthen its structure.
prompts.stats: Suggest a few supporting statistics or data points I could add to back up the claims in this article.
prompts.intro: Rewrite the introduction so it hooks the reader faster and leads naturally into the rest of the article.
prompts.listicle: Restructure the key points of this article into a numbered listicle format.

assistant.shrinkWarn: Dune returned a much shorter article than the current one. Applying it will replace the full article. Continue?

skillPrompts.seo: Run a full SEO pass on this article: fix the on-page issues in your data, strengthen headings and keyword placement using the real search queries and tracked keywords, and keep all good content intact.
skillPrompts.fixChecks: Fix every on-page issue listed in your data directly in the article, changing as little else as possible.
skillPrompts.faq: Add an FAQ section with 3-5 real long-tail questions and tight, useful answers. Keep the rest of the article unchanged.
skillPrompts.intro: Rewrite only the introduction so it hooks faster: strong first sentence, keyword in the first 100 words, clear promise. Keep every other section identical.
skillPrompts.meta: Write an optimized meta title (max 60 characters) and meta description (max 160 characters) for this article and set them.

meta.keywordHint: The phrase you want to rank for (e.g. "digital restaurant menu"). It drives the SEO score.

articleStudio.outlineEmpty: Add headings to build the outline.

links.hint: Dune scans this draft for phrases matching your other published articles and suggests real internal links.
links.empty: No opportunities found. Publish more articles or mention their topics in this draft.
links.stale: That phrase is no longer in the draft - rescan.

shopify.title: Connect Shopify
shopify.intro: Shopify now uses Dev Dashboard apps. Create one, install it on your store, and paste its Client ID + Secret — Fennex mints and refreshes access tokens automatically.
shopify.step1: 1. At dev.shopify.com, create an app in the same org as your store; add Admin API scopes (products, files).
shopify.step2: 2. Choose distribution and install the app on your store.
shopify.step3: 3. Copy the app's Client ID and Client secret from its API credentials.
shopify.secretHint: Starts with shpss_. Stored encrypted; used only to mint access tokens.
shopify.help: How to get API access tokens
shopify.connectedHint: Fennex mints and refreshes access tokens for this store automatically. Disconnecting removes the stored credentials.

errors.unauthorized: Shopify rejected these credentials. Check the Client ID/Secret, that the app is installed, and that it's in the same org as the store.
errors.invalid_domain: Use your .myshopify.com domain (e.g. your-store.myshopify.com), not your custom storefront domain.
errors.missing_credentials: Enter the Client ID and Client secret.
errors.generic: Couldn't connect to Shopify. Try again.

shopify.oauthIntro: Connect your Shopify store in one click — approve Fennex on Shopify and you're done.

woo.title: Connect WooCommerce
woo.intro: Connect your WooCommerce store with REST API keys so Fennex can sync products and publish optimized copy back.
woo.step1: 1. In WP admin, go to WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API.
woo.step2: 2. Add a key with Read/Write permissions.
woo.step3: 3. Copy the Consumer key and Consumer secret, plus your store URL, below.
woo.secretHint: Starts with cs_. Stored encrypted; used only for the REST API.
woo.help: How to create REST API keys
woo.connectedHint: Fennex can now sync products and publish to this store. Disconnecting removes the stored keys.

errors.unauthorized: WooCommerce rejected these keys. Check the key/secret and that they have Read/Write access.
errors.missing_credentials: Enter the Consumer key and secret.
errors.not_woocommerce: No WooCommerce REST API found at that URL. Is WooCommerce installed?
errors.unreachable: Couldn't reach that store URL. Check it's public and uses HTTPS.
errors.generic: Couldn't connect to WooCommerce. Try again.

agentsPage.title: The Fennex Pack
agentsPage.subtitle: Your AI team — seven specialists, each grounded in your real data

squad.title: Assemble the squad
squad.desc: One goal in — the pack plans and runs a coordinated campaign together, with handoffs and a live project room.

zerda.tagline: Hears everything happening in the search desert
capabilities: Answers questions about your real Search Console data
Finds striking-distance keywords and CTR quick wins
Explains traffic changes with charts
Recommends what to create or fix next
Tracks its recommendations and reports whether they worked

sirocco.tagline: Thinks in campaigns, not single assets
capabilities: Plans coordinated multi-asset campaigns from one goal
Generates platform-ready visuals with captions
Applies your brand kit across every asset
Improves image prompts like a pro

dune.tagline: Builds articles that accumulate rank over time
capabilities: Writes SEO-optimized long-form articles
Adapts to your brand voice and niche
Generates social posts from your content
Suggests images for every article section
Edits images from plain-language commands
Chains multiple edits in one request
Converts flat images into editable layers
Scores and SEO-optimizes your visuals
Crawls any competitor page on demand
Scores their on-page SEO out of 100
Compares their content to your real demand
Pinpoints the gaps worth striking first

oasis.tagline: Turns raw demand into client-ready market reports
capabilities: Writes complete market reports from your real search data
Sizes demand and maps the topic landscape
Quantifies opportunities and names the risks
Client-ready output you can copy or download

nomad.tagline: Goes out and finds your next clients on LinkedIn
capabilities: Plans a full week of LinkedIn posts from one goal
Saves every post as a draft ready to publish
Writes connection and follow-up DM templates
Outreach tips tuned to your niche and services
